comment: Cross-sanitizer conformance corpus — the shared source of truth that keeps hooks/shared/sanitize.js (JS, capture-time), crates/radar-redact (Rust, scan/redact), and the surface sanitizer (crates/radar-daemon surface safe_text, display-time) from drifting. Adversarial test data only — non-sensitive by construction. Consumers: hooks/shared/sanitize.test.js, crates/radar-redact tests, crates/radar-daemon surface tests.

tiers.secret_must_trip: ALL THREE sanitizers must detect these (JS: redactSecrets changes the string; redact: scan() finds; surface: whole field withheld).
tiers.surface_must_trip: Only the SURFACE sanitizer must withhold these (paths/diffs/stdout/code/entropy are display-contract rules, not capture-time secret redaction).
tiers.must_pass: ALL sanitizers must leave these unchanged (false-positive controls).

surface_must_trip:
l1
l2
l3
l4
l5
l6
must_pass:
- check the config
- restart the daemon
decide and/or defer the I/O work
